hero.title: Help Center
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to know to make the most of TrouveTout224

publish.title: Post a listing
publish.desc: Click "Post a listing" at the top of the site, choose a category, add photos, a title, a description, a price, and your city. It's free and unlimited.

shop.title: Create my shop
shop.desc: Go to "Become a seller", give your shop a name, add a photo, then post your items — they'll all appear in one place, visible to all of Guinea.

contact.title: Contact a seller
contact.desc: On a listing, click "Send a message" or directly on the WhatsApp button to chat with the seller with no middleman.

report.title: Report a problem
report.desc: On the listing or profile in question, click "Report". Describe the issue and our team reviews it quickly to keep the platform safe.

password.title: Recover my password
password.desc: On the login page, click "Forgot password", enter your email, and follow the instructions to choose a new one.

faqs.q: How do I post a listing?
faqs.a: Click "Post" in the navigation bar, fill in the form with title, description, price, photos, and contact details.
Yes, posting is 100% free and unlimited. You can post as many listings as you like.

faqs.q: How do I contact a seller?
faqs.a: On a listing, click "Send a message" or the Call/WhatsApp buttons.
On the listing, click "Report this listing". Our team reviews it within 24 hours.

faqs.q: How do I delete my listing?
faqs.a: Profile → My listings → click the listing → Delete.

faqs.q: How do I change my city?
faqs.a: Click the city name in the navigation bar and choose yours.

helpBlock.title: Need help? We respond fast.
helpBlock.subtitle: Our team is available on WhatsApp and by email to support you.

publierArticle.heroTitle: How do I post a listing?
publierArticle.heroSubtitle: The full step-by-step guide — free and unlimited

steps.title: Log in or create an account
steps.desc: Free signup in a few seconds: name, email or phone number, password. You can also use your Google account.

steps.title: Click "Post a listing"
steps.desc: The gold button is visible at the top of every page, on desktop and mobile.

steps.title: Choose a category
steps.desc: Phones, vehicles, real estate, jobs, services... Pick the one that best fits your listing.

steps.title: Fill in the details
steps.desc: Title, description, price (or "negotiable"), quantity if needed. A good title = brand + model + condition — it attracts more buyers.

steps.title: Add your photos
steps.desc: Up to 10 photos. Sharp, well-lit photos noticeably increase your chances of selling fast.

steps.title: Enter your city and neighborhood
steps.desc: This helps nearby buyers find you easily.

steps.title: Submit your listing
steps.desc: If your account is verified, your listing goes live immediately. Otherwise, our team reviews it quickly (usually within 24h) before it's visible to everyone.

tips: A clear, precise title gets a lot more views.
Several photos from different angles reassure buyers.
Reply quickly to messages: buyers in Guinea often contact several sellers at once.
Mention if the price is negotiable — it encourages buyers to reach out.

signalementArticle.heroTitle: How do I report a problem?
signalementArticle.heroSubtitle: You help keep TrouveTout224 safe — here's how to alert us

sections.title: Report a listing
sections.desc: Open the listing, click "Report this listing", then choose a reason: scam, forbidden product, suspicious price, duplicate, inappropriate content, or other.

sections.title: Report a profile or shop
sections.desc: On the seller's profile page, click "Report" and describe the issue.

sections.title: Report inside a conversation
sections.desc: In messaging, open the menu (⋮) at the top of the conversation and choose "Report". You can also block the person directly from that same menu.

sections.title: What happens next?
sections.desc: Our team reviews every report, usually within 24 hours, and takes the necessary action (warning, content removal, account suspension if needed).

safetyTips: Never pay in advance without seeing the product in person.
Meet the seller or buyer in a public, busy place.
Never send money by transfer to a stranger.
Check the product carefully before paying.
Be wary of prices far below market value.
